events.title: Trump escalates rhetoric on Iran and hints at hard retaliation
events.summary: Risk assets wobble as traders price in geopolitical escalation and oil shock risk.

events.title: Trump threatens a new tariff wave on strategic imports
events.summary: Manufacturing and mega-cap tech sell off on renewed trade-cost fears.

events.title: White House signals tariff timing could slip during talks
events.summary: Futures improve as markets start to believe the most aggressive timeline may not stick.

events.title: Administration says there is no immediate decision for direct Iran action
events.summary: Risk premium eases after officials tamp down expectations of a near-term strike.

events.title: Trade team floats carve-outs and exemptions for key import categories
events.summary: Exemption chatter feeds the TACO thesis as investors rotate back into tariff-hit names.
